title: Raccoon Removal in Fieldston, Bronx | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Fieldston, Bronx. Safe, humane trapping and exclusion for your historic home. Licensed experts serving Fieldston. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Fieldston's tree-lined streets and spacious historic homes provide the perfect habitat for raccoons seeking shelter in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive raccoon removal services tailored to the unique architecture of Fieldston's Tudor and Colonial Revival estates. Our humane trapping and exclusion methods protect both your property and the local wildlife.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Fieldston's distinctive residential community, we understand the specific challenges posed by raccoons in this heavily wooded neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane removal techniques and provide permanent exclusion solutions that preserve the historic integrity of your Fieldston home.
localContext: Fieldston's private streets, mature oak trees, and proximity to Van Cortlandt Park create an ideal environment for raccoon populations to thrive. The neighborhood's large estate homes with multiple chimneys, attic vents, and architectural details common to early 20th-century construction often provide multiple entry points that require expert sealing and wildlife-proofing.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons so common in Fieldston?
faqs.answer: Fieldston's heavily wooded streets, large properties, and proximity to Van Cortlandt Park provide abundant food sources and shelter for raccoons. The neighborhood's historic homes with mature landscaping and architectural features like chimneys and roof vents offer numerous den sites that raccoons find attractive, especially during breeding season in spring.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Fieldston?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Fieldston typically ranges from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, entry points, and extent of damage. Factors like attic size, chimney height, and the architectural complexity of historic Fieldston homes can affect pricing. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to my Fieldston home and family?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose health risks through parasites, rabies, and roundworm in their droppings. They also cause significant property damage by tearing insulation, chewing wires, damaging roof structures, and creating entry holes. Raccoons can be aggressive when cornered or protecting young, making professional removal essential for your family's safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Fieldston property?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Fieldston service calls within 24 hours for inspections. The removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of raccoons and whether babies are present. After removal, we seal all entry points and can provide attic restoration services. Baby raccoon season (spring) may require additional time to ensure humane removal of entire families.
